title: Eggs - Cobblemon Addon
description: In these eggs you can find some common, rare or shiny cobblemon
body:
![­](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b84b6c93c5b35898ab615530dff9f9490a668c3e.png) ![­](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/48a1954f14e2e1d4816014bddff2f6e705d10158.png) **Eggs - Cobblemon Addon** is a Data Pack / Mod that adds **Cobblemon Eggs**. Randomly spawns a trader villager that trade these eggs, he is expensive👀. ## How install it? Actually, this mod is a datapack converted into a mod so you should type /reload in the chat to install properly the mod! ![Command to install it](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e2bc2c742a81344b1919ba2d917d4280352cbf4e.png) ![­](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5da0442fcc8f2d77453f4c79a2bfcb0c84b1c0fc.png) ## EGGS **How I open the egg?**: Open the eggs is very easy! Just place **fire** where the egg is placed. I recommend to you to place the egg on a **netherrack** block to don't let turn off the fire! - 🔹**Common Egg**: In this egg you can find some **starter** and other common cobblemons.
Cobblemons:
  • Squirtle
  • Bulbasaur
  • Charmander
  • Pichu
  • Mankey
  • Eevee
  • Treeko
  • Torchic
  • Mudkip
  • Ralts
  • Makuhita
  • Turtwig
  • Piplup
  • Shix
  • Riolu
  • Emolga
  • Fennekin
  • Chespin
  • Froakie
  • Rowlet
  • Litten
  • Popplio
  • Stufful
  • Abra
  • Ekans
  • Pidove
  • Zigzagoon
  • Bellsprout
  • Cubone
  • Cleffa
  • Tentacool
  • Kabuto
  • Chikorita
  • Cyndaquil
  • Totodile
  • Swinub
  • Lotad
  • Barboach
  • Bagon
  • Petilil
  • Scorbunny
  • Grookey
  • Sobble
  • Chimchar
  • Snivy
  • Tepig
  • Oshawott
  • Staryu
  • Fuecoco
  • Sprigatito
  • Quaxly
- 🔸**Rare Egg**: You can find some rare cobblemon.
Cobblemon:
  • Honedge
  • Jangmo-ho
  • Ceruledge
  • Pidgeotto
  • Persian
  • Lapras
  • Dratini
  • Zorua
  • Klefki
  • Tyrunt
  • Larvitar
  • Nuzleaf
  • Gible
  • Golett
  • Armarouge
  • Rapidash
  • Weezing
  • Cofagrigus
  • Exeggutor
  • Krookodile
    • - ✨**Shiny Egg**: All the cobblemon but **shiny**. ✨ ## Nests Eggs will spawn randomly below pokemons randomly. (To avoid farming, the eggs will spawn only if there isn t a nest in the nearby). ![⠀](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/60cc214d9a56955aedc45774a403566919b07805_0.webp) ### Costs ![­](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1603df1be28faf832ddfd4f55c40e19d220fe388.png)
